subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify rhyme pairs in the source list
Recognise matching ending sounds in words

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: Rhyme is described as two words or lines that end with the same sequence of sounds.

sections.heading: Rhyme Pairs
sections.content: The note lists examples such as should/would, food/sued, bird/word, laugh/calf, ride/site, buy/sky, head/said, fail/sail, hair/bear, breeze/please, know/hoe, crave/grave, shock/rock, ball/call, and dove/love.
